claim: Biological neural networks use sparse activation and event-driven computation, consuming far less energy than dense matrix operations
actionable: Explore sparse attention mechanisms and mixture-of-experts models in LLM design to improve energy efficiency
source_title: Why the Brain Computes 1,000,000x More Efficiently Than A GPU: Unconventional AI's Naveen Rao

claim: Synaptic plasticity in brains enables efficient learning with few examples, contrasting with large batch training in AI
actionable: Investigate continual learning and few-shot adaptation techniques as alternatives to batch-based model training
source_title: Why the Brain Computes 1,000,000x More Efficiently Than A GPU: Unconventional AI's Naveen Rao

claim: Brain efficiency gains come from hierarchical organization and selective attention to high-value information
actionable: Apply hierarchical processing and attention filters in AI pipelines to reduce computational load on downstream stages
source_title: Why the Brain Computes 1,000,000x More Efficiently Than A GPU: Unconventional AI's Naveen Rao
